## tscli set device expiry

Set device key expiry

### Synopsis

Call the Tailscale API to mark a device's key as expired.

```
tscli set device expiry [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --device string   Device ID to expire
  -h, --help            help for expiry
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [human json pretty yaml]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```
